name: vercel
description: Build and deploy web apps and agents

interface.shortDescription: Build and deploy web apps and agents
interface.longDescription: Bring Vercel ecosystem guidance into Codex with curated skills and the connected Vercel app. Packages the upstream vercel/vercel-plugin skills, agents, and commands under the local `vercel` plugin identity for the Codex plugin marketplace.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo for Vercel deployment risks
Which Vercel tools fit this app best
Help wire the Vercel app into this workflow
